result.finding: src/pfas_rice_two_pool.close_longchain vs Yamazaki: the PROMOTED component reproduces the long chains at root+straw+grain log10 RMSE 0.081 (breakthrough level; the single-pool core could not -- refit_oryza ~4-6x under at ceilings). Per congener -- PFDA f_xy 0.139 carrier 1.1x root 4.2/4.2 straw 3.0/3.5 grain 3.4/3.4; PFUnDA f_xy 0.100 carrier 1.3x root 19.6/19.5 straw 7.3/8.2 grain 3.1/3.1; PFDoDA f_xy 0.436 carrier 2.8x root 70.9/69.3 straw 29.2/49.7 grain 45.5/45.5. PFDoDA straw is the lone residual (f_xy at its ceiling). Saturated 3-param fit = structural adequacy, not a-priori prediction. Verified via the model_api hook close_longchain_2pool and tests/test_two_pool.py.
